title: Email notification for status change
excerpt: I’ve attempted to create an email notification when the status change of an item changes. I’ve tried both Gmail and Outlook…and I get nothing; no errors, no emails, nothing. Help?

posts.author: element47 (Eric Jackson)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve attempted to create an email notification when the status change of an item changes. I’ve tried both Gmail and Outlook…and I get nothing; no errors, no emails, nothing. Help?

posts.author: YannD (Yann Dehuy)
posts.cookedHtml:
In a table adds an e-mail column
function available in integrations (not in automation)

Capture d’écran 2020-11-08 1024421099×152 8.48 KB

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @element47

Is this still persisting?

If so, please could you send over the setup of what you have added to your board so we can try and assist you further. If it’s a bug, we would ask you write to us at support@monday.com with a screen recording but it might just be something with the setup so let’s check it here first

Cheers,
Julia
